calendar.matters:
PETITION Petition: For Revocation Of Assignment For Benefit Of Creditors; For Discharge Of Assignee, Randy Su
Off Calendar Jun-22-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kevin Sullivan for Jerry Godell and Sisters. Bennett Young for and with Randy Sugarman. Edward Nevin for and with Fred Meis.

Judge Wiss disclosed to the Parties that she has been acquainted professionally with Mr. Meis and Mr. Nevin over the years through Professional Associations and that she does not feel that that fact affects her ability to be fair and impartial to all Parties and all Counsel. The Court stated that she does not beleive that this matter is properly in the Probate Court and that it is properly in the Civil Court. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the jurisdictional issue and then stepped out of the Courtroom to further discuss the matter. Upon returning, Counsel indicated that they had a small resolution. Mr. Nevin withdrew his petition before this Court without prejudice to their further proceedings and will revive the petition in the Civil Court. The matter was taken off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
